title: PageCraft
description: Our modpack is still in development, but is ready to delight you with cool mechanics and a steampunk atmosphere. If you want not just to play, but to be part of the development of the project
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35e40fda0ac145dea894bbcca908d16eea454c2a.webp)

Minecraft modpack/server based on create and physics

Our modpack and server are still in development and testing, but are ready to delight you with cool mechanics and a steampunk atmosphere. We are not perfect, but we are actively working on improvements. If you want not just to play, but to be part of the development of the project - welcome!

✨ What is already there:

- Parkour: Parkour locations for those who love action and challenges.
  
- Physics and airships: Thanks to the Valkyrien Skies mod, you can build flying machines and take to the skies.
  
- Updated combat: Muskets, new animations and exciting combat with the Better Combat mod.
  
- New mobs and world: Unusual creatures and beautiful locations from the Alex Mobs and Alex Caves    mod.
  
- Create Mechanisms: Build complex engineering structures from mills to huge machines.
  
- Backpacks and death cards: Survival has become more convenient and interesting.
 
- You can offer your ideas and they can be implemented. You are limited only by your imagination, and just a little knowledge of admins (don’t be angry))
     

🚧 What's in development:

- Server theme.
- Assembly release (at the time of writing, version - PreRel-last1)

💡 What you shouldn’t expect:

We do not claim to be the perfect server/modpack. You may encounter bugs or shortcomings, but we appreciate your every suggestion and feedback. Together we will make this project better!

🔥 Connect if you are interested:

-  Telegram: https://t.me/pagecraft
-  Discord: https://discord.gg/arPYFMkvyA

If you like helping create something unique, come and play. I hope you like it 🥰
